SKT_FIRST.name: Max! Heart Catch!

true_desc_levels.1: Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>80%</color> chance to increase the <color=#28d9ed>Priority</color> of all allies by <color=#28d9ed>3%</color>.\nDamage dealt increases proportional to the caster's <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color>.
true_desc_levels.2: Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>80%</color> chance to increase the <color=#28d9ed>Priority</color> of all allies by <color=#28d9ed>3%</color>.\nDamage dealt increases proportional to the caster's <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color>.
true_desc_levels.3: Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>80%</color> chance to increase the <color=#28d9ed>Priority</color> of all allies by <color=#28d9ed>3%</color>.\nDamage dealt increases proportional to the caster's <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color>.
true_desc_levels.4: Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>80%</color> chance to increase the <color=#28d9ed>Priority</color> of all allies by <color=#28d9ed>3%</color>.\nDamage dealt increases proportional to the caster's <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color>.
true_desc_levels.5: Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> chance to increase the <color=#28d9ed>Priority</color> of all allies by <color=#28d9ed>3%</color>.\nDamage dealt increases proportional to the caster's <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color>.
true_desc_levels.1_jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>80%</color>の確率で味方全体の<color=#28d9ed>行動ゲージ</color>を<color=#28d9ed>3%</color>UPさせる。\nこのスキルは、自分の<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>が高いほどダメージがUPする。
true_desc_levels.2_jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>80%</color>の確率で味方全体の<color=#28d9ed>行動ゲージ</color>を<color=#28d9ed>3%</color>UPさせる。\nこのスキルは、自分の<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>が高いほどダメージがUPする。
true_desc_levels.3_jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>80%</color>の確率で味方全体の<color=#28d9ed>行動ゲージ</color>を<color=#28d9ed>3%</color>UPさせる。\nこのスキルは、自分の<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>が高いほどダメージがUPする。
true_desc_levels.4_jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>80%</color>の確率で味方全体の<color=#28d9ed>行動ゲージ</color>を<color=#28d9ed>3%</color>UPさせる。\nこのスキルは、自分の<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>が高いほどダメージがUPする。
true_desc_levels.5_jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>の確率で味方全体の<color=#28d9ed>行動ゲージ</color>を<color=#28d9ed>3%</color>UPさせる。\nこのスキルは、自分の<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>が高いほどダメージがUPする。
true_desc_levels.1_kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>80%</color> 확률로 아군 전체의 <color=#28d9ed>행동 게이지</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>3%</color> 회복합니다.\n이 스킬은 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>방어력</color>이 높을수록 피해가 증가합니다.

true_desc_levels.2: Grants increased <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color> to all allies for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color> and grants increased <color=#28d9ed>Counterattack</color> to the caster for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.
true_desc_levels.3: Grants increased <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color> to all allies for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color> and grants increased <color=#28d9ed>Counterattack</color> to the caster for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.

true_desc_levels.2_jp: 味方全体の<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間UPさせ、自分に<color=#28d9ed>反撃</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間付与する。

SKT_ULTIMATE.name: Twinkle Twinkle ☆
SKT_ULTIMATE.name_jp: キラキラ☆トゥインクル

true_desc_levels.1: Attacks all enemies and has a <color=#28d9ed>60%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Taunted</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.\nDamage dealt increases proportional to the caster's <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color>.
true_desc_levels.2: Attacks all enemies.\nHas a <color=#28d9ed>60%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Taunted</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>, and grants <color=#28d9ed>Immunity</color> to the caster for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.\nDamage dealt increases proportional to the caster's <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color>.
true_desc_levels.3: Attacks all enemies.\nHas a <color=#28d9ed>80%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Taunted</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>, and grants <color=#28d9ed>Immunity</color> to the caster for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.\nDamage dealt increases proportional to the caster's <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color>.
true_desc_levels.4: Attacks all enemies.\nHas a <color=#28d9ed>80%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Taunted</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>, and grants <color=#28d9ed>Immunity</color> to the caster for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.\nDamage dealt increases proportional to the caster's <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color>.
true_desc_levels.5: Attacks all enemies.\nHas a <color=#28d9ed>80%</color> chance to ignore the target's Resilience and inflict <color=#28d9ed>Taunted</color> for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>. Grants <color=#28d9ed>Immunity</color> to the caster for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.\nDamage dealt increases proportional to the caster's <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color>.
true_desc_levels.1_jp: 敵全体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>60%</color>の確率で対象を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間<color=#28d9ed>挑発</color>する。\nこのスキルは自分の<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>が高いほどダメージがUPする。
true_desc_levels.2_jp: 敵全体にダメージを与える。\n<color=#28d9ed>60%</color>の確率で対象を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間<color=#28d9ed>挑発</color>し、自分に<color=#28d9ed>免疫</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間付与する。\nこのスキルは自分の<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>が高いほどダメージがUPする。
true_desc_levels.3_jp: 敵全体にダメージを与える。\n<color=#28d9ed>80%</color>の確率で対象を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間<color=#28d9ed>挑発</color>し、自分に<color=#28d9ed>免疫</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間付与する。\nこのスキルは自分の<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>が高いほどダメージがUPする。
true_desc_levels.4_jp: 敵全体にダメージを与える。\n<color=#28d9ed>80%</color>の確率で対象を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間<color=#28d9ed>挑発</color>し、自分に<color=#28d9ed>免疫</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間付与する。\nこのスキルは自分の<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>が高いほどダメージがUPする。
true_desc_levels.5_jp: 敵全体にダメージを与える。\n<color=#28d9ed>80%</color>の確率で対象の効果抵抗を無視し、対象を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間<color=#28d9ed>挑発</color>する。この時、自分に<color=#28d9ed>免疫</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間付与する。\nこのスキルは自分の<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>が高いほどダメージがUPする。
true_desc_levels.1_kr: 적 전체를 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>60%</color> 확률로 대상을 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>도발</color>합니다.\n이 스킬은 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>방어력</color>이 높을수록 피해가 증가합니다.
true_desc_levels.2_kr: 적 전체를 공격합니다.\n<color=#28d9ed>60%</color> 확률로 대상을 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>도발</color>하고, 자신은 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>면역</color>을 얻습니다.\n이 스킬은 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>방어력</color>이 높을수록 피해가 증가합니다.
true_desc_levels.3_kr: 적 전체를 공격합니다.\n<color=#28d9ed>80%</color> 확률로 대상을 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>도발</color>하고, 자신은 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>면역</color>을 얻습니다.\n이 스킬은 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>방어력</color>이 높을수록 피해가 증가합니다.
true_desc_levels.4_kr: 적 전체를 공격합니다.\n<color=#28d9ed>80%</color> 확률로 대상을 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>도발</color>하고, 자신은 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>면역</color>을 얻습니다.\n이 스킬은 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>방어력</color>이 높을수록 피해가 증가합니다.
true_desc_levels.5_kr: 적 전체를 공격합니다.\n<color=#28d9ed>80%</color> 확률로 대상의 효과 저항을 무시하고 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>도발</color>하며 자신은 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>면역</color>을 얻습니다.\n이 스킬은 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>방어력</color>이 높을수록 피해가 증가합니다.
true_desc_levels.1_zh: 攻击全体敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>60%</color>的几率对目标造成<color=#28d9ed>挑衅</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。\n自身<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>越高,则该技能的伤害越高。
true_desc_levels.2_zh: 攻击全体敌人。\n有<color=#28d9ed>60%</color>的几率对目标造成<color=#28d9ed>挑衅</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>,并使自身获得<color=#28d9ed>免疫</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。\n自身<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>越高,则该技能的伤害越高。
true_desc_levels.3_zh: 攻击全体敌人。\n有<color=#28d9ed>80%</color>的几率对目标造成<color=#28d9ed>挑衅</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>,并使自身获得<color=#28d9ed>免疫</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。\n自身<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>越高,则该技能的伤害越高。
true_desc_levels.4_zh: 攻击全体敌人。\n有<color=#28d9ed>80%</color>的几率对目标造成<color=#28d9ed>挑衅</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>,并使自身获得<color=#28d9ed>免疫</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。\n自身<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>越高,则该技能的伤害越高。
true_desc_levels.5_zh: 攻击全体敌人。\n有<color=#28d9ed>80%</color>的几率无视目标的效果抵抗,并对其造成<color=#28d9ed>挑衅</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>,且使自身获得<color=#28d9ed>免疫</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。\n自身的<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>越高,则该技能的伤害越高。

2_jp: 自分に免疫付与+1ターン
5_jp: 挑発強化\n(効果抵抗無視)

true_desc_levels.1: <color=#ffd732>Chain Finish Effect</color>: After attacking, grants <color=#28d9ed>Find Weakness</color> to all allies for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.\n\n<color=#ffd732>Dual Attack Effect</color>: Has a <color=#28d9ed>50%</color> chance to <color=#28d9ed>heal</color> the caster. The amount healed is proportional to the caster's Defense.

true_desc_levels.1_jp: <color=#ffd732>チェーン効果(トドメ)</color>:攻撃後、味方全体に<color=#28d9ed>弱点攻略</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間付与する。\n\n<color=#ffd732>連携効果</color>:<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>の確率で自分の<color=#28d9ed>HP</color>を回復する。回復量は自分の防御力が高いほどUPする。

true_desc_levels.1_kr: <color=#ffd732>체인 피니시 효과</color> : 공격 후 아군 전체에게 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>약점 공략</color>을 부여합니다.\n\n<color=#ffd732>협공 효과</color> : <color=#28d9ed>50%</color> 확률로 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>체력</color>을 회복합니다. 회복량은 자신의 방어력에 비례하여 증가합니다.

true_desc_levels.1_zh: <color=#ffd732>连携收尾效果</color>:攻击后,使全体友军获得<color=#28d9ed>攻击破绽</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。\n\n<color=#ffd732>夹攻效果</color>:有<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>的几率使自身的<color=#28d9ed>生命值</color>恢复。根据自身防御力等比提升恢复量。
